e1_sentence: Abu Sa'id reported that:  A person belonging to the clan of Aslam, who was called Ma'iz ibn Malik, came  to Allah's Messenger (may peace be upon him) and said: "I have committed  immorality (adultery), so inflict punishment upon me.
e2_sentence: He neither begged forgiveness for him nor cursed  him

e2_sentence: He then asked his people  (about the state of his mind)

e2_sentence: They said: "We do not know of any ailment of  his except that he has committed something about which he thinks that he would  not be able to relieve himself of its burden except with the punishment being  imposed upon him.
